current_life_events: Three months after the car accident that took my best friend and business partner, I am preparing for a crucial investor pitch next week while trying to keep the startup on track. My inbox is full of product updates, and my team is scrambling to fill the gaps left by my partner’s absence. I’ve been staying late every night, hoping to finish the presentation before the deadline.
mental_state: I feel a constant heaviness from the unresolved grief, coupled with a growing anxiety about the company’s future and my ability to lead alone.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The looming investor pitch and the pressure to fill my partner’s role have amplified my grief and work stress, prompting me to seek emotional support before the deadline.
